allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://spire-codex.com/api/images")
Bash(curl -s -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://spire-codex.com/api/images")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{d[\\"id\\"]}: {d[\\"count\\"]} images'\) if isinstance\(data,list\) else print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:2000]\) for d in \(data if isinstance\(data,list\) else []\)]")

Bash(curl -L -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36' -H 'Referer: https://spire-codex.com/images?version=v0.106.1' --connect-timeout 30 --max-time 600 -o d:/learning/slayTheSpire/assets/beta-cards-v0.106.1.zip https://spire-codex.com/api/images/beta-cards/download?version=v0.106.1 -w 'HTTP %{http_code}, 大小: %{size_download} bytes\\n')

PowerShell(Write-Host "---CARDS \(Ironclad relevant\)---"; Get-ChildItem "d:\\learning\\slayTheSpire\\assets\\cards" | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "strike|defend|bash|anger|cleave|armament|pommel|shrug|flex|inflame"} | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---MONSTERS---"; Get-ChildItem "d:\\learning\\slayTheSpire\\assets\\monsters" -Recurse | Select-Object -First 30 Name; Write-Host "---INTENTS---"; Get-ChildItem "d:\\learning\\slayTheSpire\\assets\\intents" | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---UI-COMBAT---"; Get-ChildItem "d:\\learning\\slayTheSpire\\assets\\ui-combat" | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---UI-MAP-NODES---"; Get-ChildItem "d:\\learning\\slayTheSpire\\assets\\ui-map-nodes" | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(cd "d:\\learning\\slayTheSpire"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit -Command `"cd 'd:\\learning\\slayTheSpire'; npx vite`""; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host "Dev server started in background")
